seo.title: Building Remix data loading and actions with React Router...
seo.description: A step-by-step implementation guide for Remix data loading and actions with React Router v7 and Prisma.

content.intro: This guide provides a step-by-step implementation process for building a data-heavy application with Remix, focusing on data loading, nested routing, and deployment. Covers migration patterns, form handling, and deployment strategies for Node, Deno, and Cloudflare Workers.
prerequisites: Familiarity with React Router v6 syntax

steps.title: Project setup with Vite
steps.explanation: Create a new project using the Remix Vite template. Select the appropriate variant (react-router-dom or @remix-run/react) based on your migration path.
pitfalls: Incorrect template selection may require reconfiguration later
Forgetting to install dependencies after template creation

steps.title: Configure data loading patterns
steps.explanation: Implement loader functions in route files to fetch data. Use the useLoaderData hook to access loaded data in components.
pitfalls: Forgetting to return a JSON response from loader functions
Not handling loader errors in production

steps.title: Implement form actions with optimistic UI
steps.explanation: Create action functions for form submissions. Use the useActionData hook to handle server responses and update UI state locally before server confirmation.
pitfalls: Not validating form data on the server side
Forgetting to reset form state after successful submission

steps.title: Set up nested routing structure
steps.explanation: Create parent route files with loader functions that provide shared data. Use <Outlet> components in parent layouts to render child routes.
pitfalls: Incorrect route hierarchy causing data loading issues
Forgetting to include <Outlet> in layout components

steps.title: Configure Cloudflare Workers deployment
steps.explanation: Create a wrangler.toml file with the correct configuration. Use the remix-cloudflare package for serverless deployment.
pitfalls: Missing environment variable configuration in Cloudflare dashboard
Incorrect main file path in deployment configuration

content.conclusion: This guide establishes a production-ready Remix application structure with data loading, form handling, and deployment configuration. Verify all API endpoints, test error boundaries, and validate deployment settings before production release.
